title: Verify live stream mark authority after fallback reliability fix
objective: Verify that fresh stream marks remain primary after the fallback reliability patch and that rest_fallback appears only when stream marks are truly missing or stale.
questions: 1. Was the dashboard process restarted after the fix?
2. Are healthy stream marks now staying primary for live cards?
3. Does mark_source now show rest_fallback only when stream data is actually missing or stale?
4. Has fallback frequency dropped compared with the pre-fix session?
5. Is the displayed mark_source consistent with the actual source used for the displayed mark?
acceptance_criteria: Explicit PASS/FAIL on stream-mark authority after restart
Explicit PASS/FAIL on fallback only appearing for true stale/missing cases
